name: Tooltip
goal: Surface a tiny non-interactive tip on hover or focus of a target element for icon labels, truncation hints, and chart-point readouts.
description: A non-interactive tooltip anchored to an external target element by id. Uses the native Popover API (popover=manual) for top-layer rendering. Shows after a configurable delay on mouseenter or focusin; hides immediately on mouseleave or focusout. Positions itself via JS getBoundingClientRect across four placements (top, bottom, left, right). Wires aria-describedby on the target when visible.
limitations: Viewport overflow-flip (automatic flip when the tooltip would clip the edge) is deferred. CSS anchor-positioning is deferred. The tooltip is non-interactive — if the pointer needs to enter the tip, use ce-hover-card instead. Only a single target per tooltip instance.

props.name: for
props.description: Id of the target element this tooltip anchors to. Resolved via document.getElementById on connect.

props.name: placement
props.description: Preferred placement of the tooltip bubble relative to the target element.

props.name: delay
props.description: Milliseconds to wait after mouseenter or focusin before showing the tooltip. Hide is always immediate.

props.name: text
props.description: Plain-text tooltip content. Prefer the default slot for rich content. If both text and slot children are present, both are rendered.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Shows the tooltip bubble immediately, bypassing the delay.

slots.description: Tooltip content. Preferred over the text attribute for rich content (formatted text, icons). Rendered inside the tooltip bubble.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for the show/hide fade + scale animation.

cssVariables.name: --ce-tooltip-z
cssVariables.description: z-index override for the tooltip bubble. Default 1100.

cssVariables.name: --ce-tooltip-max-width
cssVariables.description: Maximum width of the tooltip bubble. Default 240px.

globalDependencies.purpose: Opens the bubble in the browser top-layer.
Removes the bubble from the browser top-layer.
Reads target and bubble geometry for JS positioning.
Resolves the for= id to a live DOM element.

sideEffects.description: Calls showPopover() / hidePopover() on the internal bubble element.
sideEffects.reason: Required to enter/exit the browser top-layer for correct stacking without z-index battles.

sideEffects.description: Attaches mouseenter, mouseleave, focusin, focusout listeners to the external target element.
sideEffects.reason: The tooltip anchors to an external element — listening on the target is the only way to intercept hover and focus.

sideEffects.description: Sets and removes aria-describedby on the target element.
sideEffects.reason: WCAG 2.1 SC 1.3.1: screen-reader users must hear the tooltip text when focusing the target.

sideEffects.description: Uses setTimeout for the show delay; cleared on mouseleave/focusout and on disconnectedCallback.
sideEffects.reason: Prevents flickering when the pointer passes through the target briefly.

sideEffects.description: Attaches window scroll and resize listeners while the tooltip is visible.
sideEffects.reason: Keeps the bubble aligned to the target when the page scrolls or the viewport resizes.

a11y.notes: The host element carries role=tooltip and an auto-generated id (ce-tooltip-<n>). When the bubble becomes visible, aria-describedby is set on the target element pointing at that id; it is removed when the bubble hides. The bubble itself is not focusable (pointer-events: none; not in tab order). The target element must already be keyboard-reachable — ce-tooltip wires focusin/focusout so keyboard users trigger the tip naturally.

nondeterministicReason: timer side effect prevents byte-identical innerHTML across runs
